typedef.name: hal_adc_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ADC driver.

typedef.name: hal_adc_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ADC configuration.

typedef.name: adc_conversion_group_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ADC conversion group.

types.verbatim:
/** * @brief Type of an ADC notification callback. * * @param[in] adcp Pointer to the @p ADCDriver object triggering * the callback. */ typedef void (*adccallback_t)(ADCDriver *adcp);
/** * @brief Type of an ADC error callback. * * @param[in] adcp Pointer to the @p ADCDriver object triggering * the callback. * @param[in] err ADC error code. */ typedef void (*adcerrorcallback_t)(ADCDriver *adcp, adcerror_t err);

field.name: circular
field.brief: Enables circular buffer mode for the group.

field.name: num_channels
field.brief: Number of analog channels in the conversion group.

field.name: end_cb
field.brief: End callback associated to the group or @p NULL.

field.name: error_cb
field.brief: Error callback associated to the group or @p NULL.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ adc_lld_configuration_group_fields;
/* End of the mandatory fields.*/ adc_lld_config_fields;

field.name: samples
field.brief: Current samples buffer pointer or @p NULL.

field.name: depth
field.brief: Current samples buffer depth or zero.

field.name: grpp
field.brief: Current conversion group pointer or @p NULL.
